iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (up). Day 20 Hour 17: DETERRENT. Gabbard: IC assessed enrichment 'obliterated' in 2025 strikes, Iran NOT rebuilding. IAEA does NOT know status of new Isfahan underground enrichment facility. Iran FM: nuclear doctrine 'not likely to change'. No nuclear weapons pivot. Updated 2026-03-19T17:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 20 Hour 17: IMMINENT. Iran retaliatory strikes escalate: Haifa oil refinery hit (black smoke, Israeli grid damaged in north), millions to shelters in Israel. Gulf energy war continues: Ras Laffan LNG extensively damaged, Saudi SAMREF refinery hit, Kuwait refineries ablaze, Habshan suspended. Arab League calls it 'dangerous escalation'. Brent $118 (+60% since war). US struck 90+ targets on Kharg Island. Hegseth: US 'controls fate of Iran'. Trump paradox: claims no authorization for South Pars strike while threatening to blow it up. IRGC: attacks continue 'until complete destruction'. Updated 2026-03-19T17:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Iran hits Haifa oil refinery, damages northern Israel electricity grid
latest_news.text: Iranian strikes hit Haifa oil refinery (images show black smoke), Israeli Energy Minister confirms electricity grid in northern Israel damaged. Multiple waves targeting large parts of Israel, millions to shelters. No significant casualties reported.

latest_news.headline: Arab League calls Iran Gulf energy strikes 'dangerous escalation'
latest_news.text: Arab League Sec-Gen Aboul Gheit calls Iran strikes on Gulf energy sites 'dangerous escalation'. Saudi Arabia, Qatar, UAE, Kuwait all condemn. Risk of direct Gulf military involvement rising.

latest_news.headline: US Kharg Island strikes: 90+ targets hit, military sites obliterated, oil infrastructure spared
latest_news.text: Gen. Dan Caine confirms US struck 90+ targets on Kharg Island (90% of Iran oil exports). Military sites 'obliterated' but oil infrastructure deliberately left intact. Trump threatens to strike oil 'for fun' if Iran doesn't comply.

latest_news.headline: Brent crude $118, European gas prices doubled in one month
latest_news.text: Brent peaked $118/barrel (+60% since war began). European gas benchmark TTF doubled in one month. Asian markets (Seoul, Tokyo) down 2%+. Global energy crisis deepening.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 20 Hour 17: IMMINENT. Ground invasion continues, Litani bridges destroyed, 450K reservists mobilized. 968+ killed, 1M+ displaced. Central Beirut strikes. No ceasefire signals. Updated 2026-03-19T17:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 9% (stable). Day 20 Hour 17: DETERRENT. No new Turkey-specific developments. 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began. NATO Patriot deployment at Incirlik active. Coupling from Iran keeps base elevated. Updated 2026-03-19T17:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 9% (stable). Day 20 Hour 17: DETERRENT. No new developments. Border tension contained. Updated 2026-03-19T17:04:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 20 Hour 17: DETERRENT. Arms supply to Iran ongoing. No direct ME intervention. Ukraine front active but reduced tempo. Oil boost to Russian revenue. Updated 2026-03-19T17:04:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 6% (stable). Day 20 Hour 17: DETERRENT. 2026 Threat Assessment: US IC says China NOT planning 2027 Taiwan invasion, prefers non-force unification. PLA making 'steady but uneven' progress on capabilities. Xi anti-corruption sweep hits senior PLA chiefs. PLA joint combat readiness patrols + grey zone activities continue. No activity changes. Updated 2026-03-19T17:04:00Z

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 Hour 17: DETERRENT. Extended quiet. No new developments. Gabbard hearing mentioned DPRK advanced missile research but no provocations. Updated 2026-03-19T17:04:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 44% (stable). Day 20 Hour 17: CRITICAL. Russian attacks down to 7-10/day from 50+ pre-January (force accumulation + weather). Russia took Sopych (Sumy) and Kalenyky (Donetsk). Ukraine liberated 400km2 in Zaporizhia. Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Russia plans 409K new troops. Oil price boost to Russian revenue. No NATO-Russia incidents. Updated 2026-03-19T17:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: US-Russia-Ukraine peace talks formally paused due to Iran war
latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 43% (stable). Day 20 Hour 17: CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Mediated by Saudi Arabia, Turkey, Qatar. Post-Eid fighting expected. Updated 2026-03-19T17:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

iran_conventional: oil_above_120 — Brent crude breached $120 threshold (peaked $126, current $118)
iran_conventional: iran_energy_threat — Iran FM warns 'zero restraint' if infrastructure struck again
iran_conventional: saudi_aramco_targeted — Iranian drone hits SAMREF refinery in Yanbu (Red Sea bypass route)
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Day 20 Iran war at MAXIMUM TEMPO. IRGC explicit threat: Gulf energy attacks continue 'until complete destruction' if Iran struck again. QatarEnergy confirms MULTIPLE LNG facilities hit - 20% of world supply at risk. Qatar expels Iranian diplomats (major escalation). Trump paradox: threatens to blow up South Pars while claiming US didn't authorize Israeli strike. Speaker Johnson signals wind-down ('mission accomplished') but IRGC says otherwise. UK deploying Hormuz planners to CENTCOM - first serious allied operational involvement. Watch: IRGC 'zero restraint' implementation if further Iran strikes occur. Watch: Brent sustained above $120. Watch: Qatar direct combat involvement risk post-diplomatic expulsion. Watch: Saudi military response to SAMREF strike. Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holds through Mar 23. Russia-Ukraine talks stalled.

latest_news.headline: QatarEnergy confirms Iran struck SEVERAL LNG facilities - 'sizeable fires and extensive damage'
latest_news.text: QatarEnergy confirms Iran hit multiple LNG facilities beyond Ras Laffan Pearl GTL - 'sizeable fires and extensive further damage' at several sites. 20% of world's LNG supply moves through Ras Laffan complex.

latest_news.headline: IRGC warns Gulf energy attacks 'will not cease until complete destruction' if strikes on Iran continue
latest_news.text: IRGC explicitly warns: 'If energy infrastructure strikes on Iran are repeated, subsequent attacks on your energy infrastructure and that of your allies will not cease until their complete destruction, and our response will be far more severe.'

latest_news.headline: UK deploys military planners to CENTCOM to work on reopening Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: UK military planners deployed to US CENTCOM headquarters (Tampa) to work on options to reopen Strait of Hormuz. Enhancement to existing UK planning staff. Allies reluctant to join active combat operations.

latest_news.headline: Qatar expels Iranian military and security attachés - declares them persona non grata
latest_news.text: Qatar declares Iranian Embassy's military attaché, security attaché and related staff persona non grata and expels them following Ras Laffan LNG strikes. Major diplomatic escalation.

latest_news.headline: Abu Dhabi Habshan gas facility operations suspended - missile interception debris
latest_news.text: Operations at Abu Dhabi's Habshan gas facility and Bab oil/gas field suspended to clear debris from missile interception. No injuries. Second major Gulf energy facility disrupted today.

latest_news.headline: Trump: 'NO MORE ATTACKS BY ISRAEL' on South Pars, threatens to 'massively blow up' entire field
latest_news.text: Trump claims US 'knew nothing' about Israel's South Pars attack. Warns: if Iran attacks Qatar again, US will 'massively blow up the entirety of the South Pars Gas Field at an amount of strength and power Iran has never seen.'

latest_news.headline: US strikes 90+ targets on Kharg Island, oil infrastructure spared
latest_news.text: Gen. Dan Caine confirms US forces struck more than 90 targets on Kharg Island. Military sites 'obliterated' but oil infrastructure left alone. Trump threatens to strike oil 'for fun' if Iran doesn't comply.

latest_news.headline: Hegseth: 'Iran's 11 submarines are gone', US 'controls the fate of Iran'
latest_news.text: SecDef Hegseth: 'The United States military controls the fate of that country. Iran has the ability to make the right choices.' Confirms all 11 Iranian submarines destroyed.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard: IC assessed Iran enrichment 'obliterated', was NOT rebuilding
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard testified Iran's nuclear enrichment was 'obliterated' in 2025 strikes and IC assessed Iran was NOT rebuilding it prior to war. Declined to call it 'imminent nuclear threat' — said only president can determine.

latest_news.headline: Israeli officials say US helped coordinate South Pars gasfield strike
latest_news.text: Three Israeli officials tell Reuters the US actually helped coordinate Israel's attack on Iran's South Pars gasfield — contradicting Trump administration's attempt to distance from the strike.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 17:04 UTC) — (1) Iran retaliatory strikes intensify: Haifa oil refinery hit, northern Israel grid damaged, millions to shelters; (2) Gulf energy war continues: Ras Laffan LNG extensively damaged, SAMREF refinery hit, Kuwait refineries ablaze, Habshan suspended; (3) Arab League calls it 'dangerous escalation', Gulf military involvement risk rising; (4) Brent $118, European gas doubled in one month, global energy crisis deepening; (5) IRGC: attacks continue 'until complete destruction'; (6) Trump threatens to blow up South Pars, claims no authorization for Israel's strike; (7) US struck 90+ targets on Kharg Island; (8) Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23; (9) Russia-Ukraine: attacks down to 7-10/day, force accumulation posture; (10) China NOT planning 2027 Taiwan invasion per US IC.
